steps.title: Find the line from the points
steps.content: Use the table points $(0,-2)$ and $(2,4)$. The slope is $$m=\frac{4-(-2)}{2-0}=3,$$ and the $y$-intercept is $-2$. So $$f(x)=3x-2.$$

steps.title: Evaluate f(3)
steps.content: $$f(3)=3(3)-2=7.$$ The value is $7$, which matches B. This uses the requested input $x=3$, not the table input $x=2$, so it answers the actual question.
